title: podman inspect of image shows a lot less then buildah inspect of an image.

comments.body: I'm fine with adding information to the output of inspect here, so long as we don't change anything there - strictly appending new fields, no formatting changes to existing ones.

@rhatdan how about we add:

* history
* namespaceoptions
* configurenetwork
* idmappingoptions
* defaultcapbilities
* addcapabilities
* dropcapabilities
Images don't specify a lot of those, though - that seems specific to the buildah container?
Ping.  Is this still a desired change?
I think so, most likely waiting in stealth to attack @haircommander when he returns early next year.
@QiWang19 Could you take a look at this?
